title: The Origin of Zeno
subtitle: How a data hero rose from the depths of dashboards to bring the power of answers to all who seek them.
author: Team Data

slides.heading: The Origin of Zeno
slides.subheading: How a data hero rose from the depths of dashboards to bring the power of answers to all who seek them.
slides.narration: In the digital realm of data and dashboards, a legend was about to unfold—the tale of an oracle who would transform how mortals commune with their information.

slides.text:
In the age before Zeno, the people of Breezeway wandered in darkness. They had data — mountains of it — but to unlock its secrets required arcane rituals: SQL incantations, dashboard quests, and weeks of waiting for the data priests to return with answers.

Then one day, an oracle emerged. You ask a question in plain English. Zeno translates it into a database query. And you get instant answers — in seconds, not days.
slides.narration: Before Zeno's awakening, data seekers faced an arduous journey through complex queries and endless waiting, until one fateful day when plain language became the key to instant enlightenment.

slides.heading: The Three Temples
slides.subheading: Each temple holds different knowledge. Choose wisely.

agents.name: Ops Agent
agents.domain: Tasks, work orders, scheduling, team management, payments, cleaning, maintenance
agents.example: What is the average task completion time for paid companies last month?

agents.name: Guest Experience
agents.domain: Messaging, Assist AI, response times, guest reviews, guest guides, verification
agents.example: What percentage of messages are handled automatically by Assist AI?

agents.name: Integrations
agents.domain: Smart home devices, PMS integrations, public API, webhooks
agents.example: Which PMS partners have the most active connections?

slides.narration: Three sacred domains await the data seeker, each guarding different realms of knowledge—operations, guest experience, and integrations—where specialized wisdom flows to those who choose their path.

slides.heading: The Art of Asking
slides.subheading: A vague question gets a vague answer. Precision is the sword that cuts through fog.

tips.title: Always include a time range
tips.text: "Last week," "Q4 2025," "the last 6 months" — without a date, Zeno has to guess.

tips.title: Use specific metric names
tips.text: Say completion rate, response time, active homes — not vague terms like "performance."

tips.title: One question at a time
tips.text: Ask three things, get a muddled answer. Ask one, get precision.

tips.title: Build on your answers
tips.text: Follow up to drill deeper. "Break that down by segment" works great.

slides.narration: The ancient art of inquiry holds great power, where the precision of one's question determines the clarity of the oracle's response.

slides.heading: Begin Your Legend
slides.subheading: We can't wait to see what you build. Submit your story on the homepage to build the legend of Zeno.

steps.label: III
steps.title: Start Asking
steps.text: Pick an agent. Ask a question.

slides.narration: Your journey into the realm of instant answers begins now—three sacred steps will unlock the power that transforms questions into revelations.
